description: Animals slaughtered for meat by country and animal type, 1961-2024. Fork of the Observable 'Expert Evaluation: Improved Puzzles' notebook, Puzzle #2 (https://observablehq.com/d/0b17bbe3cfadf5ed). Data: Our World in Data (ourworldindata.org/grapher/animals-slaughtered-for-meat.csv).

transform.filter: (datum.country === 'Brazil' && country_Brazil) || (datum.country === 'China' && country_China) || (datum.country === 'United Kingdom' && country_UnitedKingdom) || (datum.country === 'Afghanistan' && country_Afghanistan) || (datum.country === 'New Zealand' && country_NewZealand) || (datum.country === 'Pakistan' && country_Pakistan) || (datum.country === 'Mexico' && country_Mexico) || (datum.country === 'South Korea' && country_SouthKorea) || (datum.country === 'Argentina' && country_Argentina) || (datum.country === 'Spain' && country_Spain) || (datum.country === 'United States' && country_UnitedStates)
